title: BLOCK payload
description: Emitted when an agent is stuck and needs help. Triggers the coordinator immediately and is routed to peers with potentially relevant capabilities.

blocker.description: Concise description of what is preventing progress.

needed.description: What would unblock the agent (information, action, decision).

attempted.description: Approaches the agent has already tried. Helps peers/coordinator avoid suggesting the same.

urgency.description: How urgently this block needs resolution. 'high' triggers immediate mid-stream injection to capable peers.

topics.description: Topic tags. Used to route to peers with matching subscriptions.
